headline: FTX Pays $900M to Creditors in Fifth Payout

article.title: FTX to distribute $900M to creditors in fifth payment round
article.summary: The FTX Recovery Trust and company have distributed about $10 billion since the exchange filed for bankruptcy in November 2022, leaving users cut off from their funds.

article.title: Galaxy lands 15-year Texas Tech stadium naming rights deal
article.summary: Galaxy Digital will rename Texas Tech’s football stadium under a 15-year agreement, expanding its West Texas presence as the state attracts growing crypto investment.

headline: China Boosts $10B Kyrgyzstan Mineral Trade Ties

article.title: China Urges Better Cooperation With Kyrgyzstan on Green Minerals
article.summary: China urged stronger cooperation with Kyrgyzstan across the green minerals industrial chain, while calling for the protection of the rights and interests of Chinese companies in the country, according to a statement from the Ministry of Commerce on Saturday.

headline: China's CRRC Seeks $10B EU Acquisition Deal

article.title: China’s Siemens Competitor Eyes Buying Its Way Into Europe
article.summary: Shenzhen Inovance Technology Co. Ltd. is considering acquisitions in Europe, signaling the Chinese company is readying a push to compete in Europe with industrial incumbents like Siemens AG and top auto supplier Robert Bosch GmbH.

headline: BIP-110 Fails: Miner Support Stays Below 1% Threshold
